opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Horizon Air has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors with online options.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling widget to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected on Horizon Air's site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's hot summers and cold winters create two seasonal tune-up opportunities being missed.
opportunities.fix: Automate bi-annual maintenance reminders via SMS and email to drive recurring revenue.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Horizon Air has 98 Google reviews at 4.4 stars with no owner responses visible.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospective Boise customers evaluating HVAC providers.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to auto-generate personalized, brand-consistent responses to every new review.
